theme_strategy.philosophy: Information Density & Optical Clarity. No decorative gradients. 1px borders. High contrast data.

rules: NEVER use pure black (#000000) for backgrounds. Use #0A0A0B.
Borders must be subtle: border-white/10 or border-zinc-800.
Use 'Chivo' for all major headings to convey authority.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for ALL numbers, financial data, and technical specs.
Use Uppercase + Wide Tracking for labels (e.g., 'MARKET CAP', 'YTD CHANGE').

strategies: DASHBOARD: Use a 12-column grid. Key metrics (Ticker tape) at top.
ANNOUNCEMENTS: 2-column layout. Left: List/Feed. Right: Detail View (Master-Detail pattern).
MARKET DATA: Dense table rows with sparklines.
PRODUCT PORTFOLIO: Masonry grid of cards with technical specs overlaid.

button.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white font-medium rounded-sm px-4 py-2 text-sm shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(59,130,246,0.2)]
button.secondary: bg-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-700 text-white font-medium rounded-sm px-4 py-2 text-sm border border-zinc-700
button.outline: bg-transparent border border-zinc-700 text-zinc-300 hover:text-white hover:border-zinc-500 rounded-sm

input.style: bg-zinc-900 border-zinc-800 text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500 rounded-sm

badge.success: bg-green-500/10 text-green-500 border border-green-500/20 rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono
badge.warning: bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-500 border border-amber-500/20 rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono
badge.danger: bg-red-500/10 text-red-500 border border-red-500/20 rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono
badge.neutral: bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-400 border border-zinc-700 rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono

charts.style: Minimalist. Remove grid lines (or make them very subtle #27272A). Use thick strokes (2px) for lines. Use gradients for area fills.
charts.tooltip: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 text-zinc-300 rounded-sm shadow-xl

surface_effects: Use 'Scanlines' overlay (subtle repeating linear gradient) on specific 'Technical' sections (optional).
Use 'Grid' background pattern for empty states.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid #27272A (zinc-800). No rounded corners > 4px. Aim for 'Machined Metal' look.
visual_enhancers.shadows: None or very subtle ambient (shadow-sm). Rely on borders for separation.

images.strategy: Use abstract technical imagery or specific military hardware. Avoid stock people photos. Use logos as Typography if images unavailable.
images.logos_fallback: Use styled text for logos: e.g., [ LOCKHEED ]

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-zinc-400 on bg-zinc-950 meets 4.5:1. If not, bump to text-zinc-300.
accessibility.interactive: Focus states must use ring-2 ring-blue-500 ring-offset-2 ring-offset-zinc-950.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Ensure Tailwind config includes the 'Chivo' and 'JetBrains Mono' fonts. If not, add them via Google Fonts import in index.css.
2. THEME: Force DARK MODE by default. Add 'dark' class to html/body.
3. NAVIGATION: Create a Sidebar or Topbar that feels like a 'Console'. Use icons from Lucide-React (Shield, Radar, Activity, Globe, FileText, Settings).
4. DASHBOARD: The home page must be a 'Mission Control'. Top row: 4 key metrics (Market Pulse). Middle: Big Map or Main Chart. Bottom: Recent Intel Feed.
5. DATA: Use Mock Data that looks realistic (e.g., 'Lockheed Martin (LMT) +1.2%', 'DoD Contract #8829 awarded').
6. TABLES: Use Shadcn Table. Style it to look like a manifest. Condensed rows. Monospace numbers.
7. CHARTS: Use Recharts. Style: Dark tooltip, minimal axes, neon lines.
8. REGULATIONS: Use an 'Accordion' component for the Regulations Database (easy to scan headers, expand for details).
9. PORTFOLIO: Use a 'Card Grid' with image top, specs bottom (Speed, Range, Payload).
10. ADMIN: Simple CRUD tables. Keep it functional.
CRITICAL: Do not make it look like a generic SaaS. Make it look like a Tool for Professionals.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Avoid gradients on backgrounds. Use solid dark grays.
Micro-interactions: Hovering a card should slightly lighten the border (zinc-800 -> zinc-600).
Data density is good. Don't be afraid of small text (text-xs) for metadata.
